objective: Build a fixed-PVRIG sequence-to-computational-dual-docking surrogate that allocates expensive docking budget across a larger candidate pool.
claim_boundary: V4-C predicts computational dual-conformation docking geometry and uncertainty only. It is not a PVRIG binding probability, affinity/Kd predictor, competition assay result, experimental blocker label, or Docking Gold release.

v1_3.allowed_use: diagnostic continuous geometry and measurement-variance analysis only
v1_3.forbidden_use: training labels, Docking Gold, or retrospective threshold repair

minimum_future_requirements: at least 3 families unseen by the previous development method
experimental binding and blocking evidence kept separate from docking geometry

remote_controls.training_policy: measurement calibration and evaluator stability only; never counted as independent candidate or biological family

teacher500.policy: lower-fidelity open-development replay only; never a formal V4-C test set

full_qc_complete290.policy: developability and portfolio evidence only; not docking geometry supervision

split_contract.selection_time: before reading new campaign result-level docking labels
selection_fields: selection_bucket from the pre-existing V2 panel
split_contract.open_development_policy: five-fold near-CDR3-family grouped cross-validation; all model and weight selection uses open rows only
split_contract.untouched_test_policy: one evaluator-only unseal after target formula, features, baselines, seeds, metrics, and thresholds are frozen
split_contract.known_limitation: The 128 candidates come from one generator run and only three scaffold IDs. The untouched split tests unseen near-CDR3 families, not unseen generator or unseen scaffold.

teacher_release_gate.failed_job_policy: A candidate-conformation remains eligible only when at least two other seeds pass all evidence gates; missing seed increases uncertainty and is never imputed as success.

continuous_teacher_definition.pose_rank: sort complete native/cross model pairs by ascending HADDOCK score within each job
continuous_teacher_definition.receptor_score: median job_score over successful seeds for that docking conformation
candidate_targets: supporting seed fraction and successful seed count
continuous_teacher_definition.tier_policy: Legacy A/B/C/E and derived G distributions are diagnostic soft explanation only and never the sole or primary training target.

model_sequence.stage_1: frozen sequence embeddings plus a small multi-output ridge or two-layer MLP
model_sequence.stage_2_condition: A more complex cross-attention adapter is permitted only after stage_1 beats all shortcut baselines on grouped open validation and the untouched test.
main_model_forbidden_inputs: new docking result fields at inference
hard G1-G5 as the only target
model_sequence.generic_binding_prior_policy: Keep generic binding prior as a separately reported evidence axis and ablation. It may enter the final allocation ranker only after the geometry-only model is evaluated.

deployment_policy.out_of_domain_policy: Because the high-fidelity teacher has only three scaffolds and zero exact overlap with the 7087 pool, report embedding or sequence-distance uncertainty and cap model exploitation when candidates are outside the open-development support.
deployment_policy.final_submission_authority: fresh real docking plus QC, developability, binding prior, manual pose review, and portfolio diversity
